value: 일본 국외 거주 외국인 여권 소지자. 'Temporary Visitor' 체류자격으로 입국한 자만 구매 가능. 일본 국적자 또는 일본 거주 외국인은 구매 불가.

value.비고: 2023년 10월 인상 후 유지. 2025-2026 추가 인상 없음.

value: 한국 국적자는 90일 이내 관광 목적 무비자 입국 가능. 여권 잔여 유효기간 제한 없음 (체류 기간 이상 권장). Visit Japan Web 사전 등록 권장.
Suica/PASMO 등 IC카드로 전철, 버스, 편의점 결제 가능. 물리 카드 재고 부족은 2025.3월 공식 해소. Welcome Suica(관광객용, 28일 유효) 주요 역에서 판매 재개. 모바일 Suica(Apple/Google) 및 Welcome Suica Mobile(iPhone, 180일 유효) 이용 가능.
지정석(Reserved)과 자유석(Non-reserved) 구분. JR Pass 소지 시 지정석 무료 예약 가능 (Nozomi/Mizuho 제외). 자유석은 선착순 탑승.
면세 범위: 주류 3병(760ml 이하), 담배 200개비(거주자)/400개비(비거주자), 향수 2oz, 기타 품목 20만엔 이하. 초과 시 신고 및 관세 부과.

value.비고: 구급차 무료, 치료비는 별도. 119/110은 일본어 우선이나 통역 연결 가능.

value: Visit Japan Web은 웹 기반 서비스(앱 불필요). 여권 정보, 입국심사(하선카드), 세관신고, 면세쇼핑 3개 항목 사전 등록. 등록 후 QR코드 발급 → 공항 도착 시 제시. 2026년 현재 필수는 아니나 강력 권장 (심사 시간 대폭 단축). 스크린샷 불가, 라이브 접속 필요.

신제도_2026_11월.방식: 환급형 (구매 시 세금 포함 → 출국 시 환급)

value: All foreign nationals or people who need to obtain a short-term visa to Japan and currently reside in Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Taiwan, United Kingdom, or U.S.A. are eligible to apply for a tourist visa online.
Any item whose overseas market value is under 10,000 yen is free of duty and/or tax and is not included in the calculation of the total overseas market value of all articles.
Foreigners can use Visit Japan Web for immigration procedures (immigration clearance, customs declaration) and tax-free purchases during their stay in Japan.

Foreign visitors in Japan can access emergency medical assistance services including medical referrals, medical monitoring, emergency patient transports, hospital arrangements for evacuation or repatriation, and interpretation support.
Budget accommodation price range in Kyoto: ¥2,000 to ¥8,000 per night, per person
Tokyo Disney Resort – $240 for 4 days, $40/day, $66 for the trip
One-day pass to either Tokyo Disney park costs around 7,900 yen on a weekday
Evening pass costs 4,500 yen on weekdays (entry from 5 pm) and 8,700 yen on weekends (entry from 3 pm)
One of the cheaper dates for Fantasy Springs Hotel Grand Chateau is 305,000 yen for a room
Admission from $14
The Suica card initially costs ¥1000, of which ¥500 is credit and ¥500 is a refundable deposit
The Japan Rail Pass is valid on almost all trains operated on the nationwide JR network, including shinkansen, limited express, rapid, and local trains, but generally not valid on non-JR trains.
Jug of beer (500ml) = ¥500; Afternoon snack (bakery item/rice ball) = ¥130
The only card-type IC card currently available for travelers to purchase is the Welcome Suica, which can be bought at designated locations and black multifunction ticket machines.
Many convenience stores such as 7-Eleven, FamilyMart, and Lawson operate 24 hours a day, even on national holidays.
Ryokan inns can be found across Japan, including places like Kyoto and Kawaguchiko
Ryokan are traditional Japanese-style inns with Japanese-style rooms, typically including dinner and breakfast, recommended for travelers to experience traditional Japanese lifestyle.
When eating noodle dishes in Japan, local culture dictates that you slurp rather than chew, which is believed to enhance the flavor.

Many popular attractions in Japan become unbearably crowded by midday, so it is recommended to visit attractions early, for example, arrive at Tokyo’s Senso-ji temple by 9 am to avoid crowds.
Travelers should review coverage maps during trip planning to ensure reliable mobile internet access in Japan.
Some convenience stores and electronics shops in Japan carry prepaid SIM cards for travelers who didn't purchase a SIM card at the airport.

Insert the SIM card into your phone upon arrival in Japan and configure the APN settings. The SIM will self-activate once your phone detects a cellular signal. If your phone is dual SIM, ensure only the Japan Travel SIM is inserted in the primary SIM slot.
Naruto Taiyaki Honpo, a chain with locations throughout Japan

Kaiseki is Japan’s most refined dining, almost synonymous with Western haute cuisine, requiring the highest level of etiquette and respect for the food, typically prepared by experienced professional chefs.
The validity period of a Japan Rail Pass is the consecutive 7, 14, or 21 days beginning on the date the pass can actually be first used.
Many convenience stores such as 7-Eleven, FamilyMart, and Lawson, as well as some chain restaurants and discount stores, operate 24 hours a day, even on national holidays.
Each Suica is valid for 180 days from the issuance date (Welcome Suica Mobile)
Credit cards such as Visa, JCB, and Mastercard are widely accepted in Japan, but travelers should be prepared to pay with cash as an alternative since payment errors may occur at some locations.
Some stores inside and around train stations, many konbini, vending machines, and other stores accept payment with prepaid IC cards such as Suica and PASMO in Japan.
The shinkansen (bullet train) takes around 2 hours and 15 minutes between Tokyo and Kyoto
Use the Japan Rail Pass as a cost-effective travel companion for riding Shinkansen and other trains across Japan, including access to Green Car reservations and specific seat selections.
Taxi ride from Haneda Airport to Tokyo takes around 30-40 minutes
JR Kansai Airport Rapid Service takes about 50 minutes to Osaka Station
Airport shuttle bus takes around 25 minutes to central Osaka
Tokyo Monorail connects Haneda to Hamamatsucho Station in central Tokyo in about 15 minutes
Nankai Airport Express Bus takes about 50 minutes to Osaka
Narita Airport to Tokyo train journey takes about 1 hour
Single-entry tourist visa fee is $20.00
Single-entry tourist visa fee for Indian passport holders is $6.00
Multiple-entry tourist visa fee for Indian passport holders is $6.00
Duty-free allowance applies to items with a total market value under 200,000 yen; items worth more than 200,000 yen each have no duty-free allowance
If you qualify for the Japan e-visa, the application process is entirely online, making it easy and fast.
When entering Japan, travelers must submit a Customs Declaration form for both personal effects and unaccompanied baggage at Customs Clearance.
Collected info for tips from How to Use the Japan Rail Pass: 2026 User Guide

You need to purchase a JR Pass Exchange Order from an authorized sales agent outside Japan prior to arrival, such as in the US, and then exchange the Order for the actual JR Pass at designated exchange offices in Japan within 3 months of issuance.
